mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_REQUEST WHERE JOIN_NO = #{joinNo} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_REQUEST WHERE JOIN_NO = #{joinNo} AND STATUS = 'ACCEPTED'
SELECT JOIN_REQUEST_NO , ASPIRATION , STATUS , JR.JOIN_NO , JR.USER_ID , JB.USER_ID AS host FROM JOIN_REQUEST JR JOIN JOIN_BOARD JB ON(JB.JOIN_NO = JR.JOIN_NO) WHERE JOIN_REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_REQUEST JR JOIN JOIN_BOARD JB ON(JB.JOIN_NO = JR.JOIN_NO) WHERE JB.USER_ID = #{userId}
AND JR.STATUS = #{status}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_REQUEST JR JOIN JOIN_BOARD JB ON(JB.JOIN_NO = JR.JOIN_NO) WHERE JR.USER_ID = #{userId}
AND JR.STATUS = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE JOIN_REQUEST SET STATUS = 'ACCEPTED' WHERE JOIN_REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}
UPDATE JOIN_REQUEST SET STATUS = 'DENIED' WHERE JOIN_REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}
mapper.select: SELECT JOIN_REQUEST_NO , ASPIRATION , STATUS , JOIN_NO , USER_ID FROM JOIN_REQUEST WHERE STATUS = 'ACCEPTED' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND JOIN_NO = #{joinNo}
